title: Painful Stabs
description: Shuffle [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Wound[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] each time you receive unblocked attack damage.
smart_description: Shuffle [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]{Amount:plural:Wound|Wounds}[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] each time you receive unblocked attack damage.
notes: Triggers on each unblocked attack received. Total wounds shuffled = Amount × number of unblocked hits received by a single player. Does not remove power when owner dies and does not remove other creatures from combat after they die.
